64682fcffaa56bc597faa3ef.question: One mayor of this city, Angelo Rossi, declared a state of emergency after the deaths of Nicholas Bordois and Howard Sperry during a strike in the so-called Bloody Thursday Riot. Governor Henry Gage denied the existence of a health hazard in this city, leading to his replacement by George Pardee in the next election cycle. That health hazard, which was managed by Joseph Kinyoun, was an epidemic of plague that ravaged its Chinatown district. Daniel Burnham’s plans to redesign this city were never realized due to a catastrophic event that caused John McLaren to build shelters for the displaced and that was investigated by the Lawson Report. The term Flower Children was applied to the over 100,000 people who flocked to this city’s Haight-Ashbury District during the Summer of Love, marking the highpoint of the hippie movement. For 10 points, name this California city harmed by a 1906 earthquake and home to the Golden Gate Bridge.
64682fcffaa56bc597faa3ef.question_sanitized: One mayor of this city, Angelo Rossi, declared a state of emergency after the deaths of Nicholas Bordois and Howard Sperry during a strike in the so-called Bloody Thursday Riot. Governor Henry Gage denied the existence of a health hazard in this city, leading to his replacement by George Pardee in the next election cycle. That health hazard, which was managed by Joseph Kinyoun, was an epidemic of plague that ravaged its Chinatown district. Daniel Burnham's plans to redesign this city were never realized due to a catastrophic event that caused John McLaren to build shelters for the displaced and that was investigated by the Lawson Report. The term Flower Children was applied to the over 100,000 people who flocked to this city's Haight-Ashbury District during the Summer of Love, marking the highpoint of the hippie movement. For 10 points, name this California city harmed by a 1906 earthquake and home to the Golden Gate Bridge.

64682fcffaa56bc597faa456.question: One holder of this position tried to rob Saint Anselm of Canterbury, and another claimed the title King of Thessalonica during the Sixth Crusade. Richard the Justiciar was one early holder of this title from the Bosonid Dynasty. One female holder of this title was Mary the Rich, who married Holy Roman Emperor Maximilian I, while another holder was assassinated by followers of the future Charles VII of France. That man, John I the Fearless, had led a side named for this title in a civil war against the Armagnacs. Painters like van der Weyden flourished at the court of one of these rulers, often centered at Brussels. For 10 points, name this European title, famously held by Philip the Good and Charles the Bold.
64682fcffaa56bc597faa456.question_sanitized: One holder of this position tried to rob Saint Anselm of Canterbury, and another claimed the title King of Thessalonica during the Sixth Crusade. Richard the Justiciar was one early holder of this title from the Bosonid Dynasty. One female holder of this title was Mary the Rich, who married Holy Roman Emperor Maximilian I, while another holder was assassinated by followers of the future Charles VII of France. That man, John I the Fearless, had led a side named for this title in a civil war against the Armagnacs. Painters like van der Weyden flourished at the court of one of these rulers, often centered at Brussels. For 10 points, name this European title, famously held by Philip the Good and Charles the Bold.
64682fcffaa56bc597faa456.answer: Duke / Duchess of Burgundy [or duc / duchesse de Bourgogne, accept word forms that include both parts]
64682fcffaa56bc597faa456.answer_sanitized: Duke / Duchess of Burgundy [or duc / duchesse de Bourgogne, accept word forms that include both parts]

64682fcffaa56bc597faa4db.question: Fuel shortages on one side in this battle led to them using an especially flammable type of oil that contributed to their high casualty rate. This lack of fuel also led a battle plan, called Operation A-Go, to be drawn up intended for a fight much further to the west. At the end of this battle, at least 88 planes fell into the ocean after running out of fuel, but most pilots were saved when Marc Mitscher made the risky move of turning on the lights on his ships. One ship was sunk during this battle by a single torpedo from the Albacore and another was sunk by the Cavalla -these were the carriers Taiho and Shokaku. This battle began when the Combined Fleet was intercepted as it attempted to relieve the land forces at the contemporaneous battle of Saipan, and the ease with which Raymond Spruance's 5th Fleet gunned down nearly 600 planes in this battle led to its famous nickname. For 10 points, name this June 1944 carrier battle between the US and Japan that was fought in a body of water northeast of Manila.
64682fcffaa56bc597faa4db.question_sanitized: Fuel shortages on one side in this battle led to them using an especially flammable type of oil that contributed to their high casualty rate. This lack of fuel also led a battle plan, called Operation A-Go, to be drawn up intended for a fight much further to the west. At the end of this battle, at least 88 planes fell into the ocean after running out of fuel, but most pilots were saved when Marc Mitscher made the risky move of turning on the lights on his ships. One ship was sunk during this battle by a single torpedo from the Albacore and another was sunk by the Cavalla -these were the carriers Taiho and Shokaku. This battle began when the Combined Fleet was intercepted as it attempted to relieve the land forces at the contemporaneous battle of Saipan, and the ease with which Raymond Spruance's 5th Fleet gunned down nearly 600 planes in this battle led to its famous nickname. For 10 points, name this June 1944 carrier battle between the US and Japan that was fought in a body of water northeast of Manila.
64682fcffaa56bc597faa4db.answer: Battle of the Philippine Sea or the Great Marianas Turkey Shoot
64682fcffaa56bc597faa4db.answer_sanitized: Battle of the Philippine Sea or the Great Marianas Turkey Shoot

64682fcffaa56bc597faa4de.question: One king of this region, Ecgfrith, was crushed by Bridei at the Battle of Nechtansmere. Another king, Oswald, was killed at the Battle of Maserfield by Penda but was avenged by his brother Oswy. The first important king of this region was Oswald and Oswy's father, Aethelfrith of Bernicia, whose descendants conquered Deira to create this kingdom. This area was known as the Kingdom of Jorvik after it was conquered by Halfdan Ragnarsson's Great Heathen Army, and St. Wilfrid brought this region under the authority of the Roman church at the Synod of Whitby. This kingdom was the location of important monasteries such as Lindisfarne, Wearmouth and Jarrow, the home of the Venerable Bede. For 10 points, name this northernmost kingdom of the Anglo-Saxon heptarchy, which lay north of the Humber River.
64682fcffaa56bc597faa4de.question_sanitized: One king of this region, Ecgfrith, was crushed by Bridei at the Battle of Nechtansmere. Another king, Oswald, was killed at the Battle of Maserfield by Penda but was avenged by his brother Oswy. This area was known as the Kingdom of Jorvik after it was conquered by Halfdan Ragnarsson's Great Heathen Army, and St. Wilfrid brought this region under the authority of the Roman church at the Synod of Whitby. This kingdom was the location of important monasteries such as Lindisfarne, Wearmouth and Jarrow, the home of the Venerable Bede.
